title: Opfergang
writer: Rudolf G. Binding, Alfred Braun, Veit Harlan
actors: Carl Raddatz, Kristina Söderbaum, Irene von Meyendorff
plot: Idle intellectuals Albrecht, Octavia and Äls, are given to quoting and emulating their philosopher hero, Nietzsche. Albrecht later contracts typhus bringing the foster child gravely ill Äls out of an infected area.
